name: Dockmaster Marina Management API
what_it_does: Dockmaster REST API for marina and boatyard management software. Enables AI agents to manage slip and storage reservations, handle boat and vessel records with hull tracking, manage service work orders and yard operations, process marina billing and slip rental invoicing, access transient and seasonal slip inventory, handle fuel dock transactions, retrieve vessel and customer history, and integrate marina operations with channel booking platforms and accounting systems.
use_cases: Managing slip reservations and transient boat bookings from marina operations agents
Processing service work orders and haul-out scheduling from boatyard agents
Accessing vessel and customer records from marina customer service agents
Integrating slip inventory with online booking platforms from distribution agents
not_for: Non-marine facilities without boat slip and storage workflows
Campground or RV park without marine boatyard operations
Port authority without commercial marina management
best_when: A marina, boatyard, or yacht club using Dockmaster wants AI agents to automate slip reservations, work order management, billing, and vessel tracking workflows.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Marina billing includes slip leases, storage contracts, and fuel transactions. Service work order billing on expensive vessels has significant liability if errors occur. Vessel movement data may have maritime security implications.

auth.notes: Dockmaster uses API key authentication. Account-level credentials. No granular scope control. Integration primarily via partner program and data export. Limited public API documentation. On-premises and cloud versions available.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — marina management subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-marina pricing; enterprise pricing for marina chains
pricing.notes: Fort Lauderdale, Florida. Founded 1986. Long-standing marina management software provider. Used by marinas, boatyards, and yacht clubs across US and internationally. Competes with Dockwa (booking-focused) for marina management. Strong work order and service management for boatyards.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; contact for specifics

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Marina service billing on expensive vessels — work order accuracy critical
No public MCP server — API key with limited documentation
No webhooks — polling required for reservation and work order updates
No granular scopes — API key grants full account access
Legacy platform (since 1986) — API may reflect older design patterns
Fuel dock transactions require separate accounting integration — not unified in API
agent_readiness.security_notes: Marina customer and vessel data. PCI-DSS. API key only. US data residency. Legacy platform with limited documentation.

security_score_components.security_notes: Marina customer and vessel data. PCI-DSS. API key only. US data residency. Legacy platform.
